description: Composition Printed mustard kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar and V-neck, embroidered yoke, three-quarter sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear art wherever you go! The flowy soft fabric and blend of colours and print makes this kurta from aneri a fab buy. Pair it with leggings, heeled sandals and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
